texto: I One of the signs of maturity is a healthy respect for reality-a respect that manifests itself in the level of one's aspirations and in the accuracy of one's assessment of the difficulties which separate the facts of today from the bright hopes of tomorrow.
explicacao: Citação de Robert H. Davies sobre temas ligados a tempo. “I One of the signs of maturity is a healthy respect for reality-a respect that manifests itself i…” articula tempo, acceptance, reflexao em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
